calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey D. Wohl, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
10:10am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Nhu Tran, appearing in Pro Per; Appellant, Alfre Cain, appearing in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Judge Wohl has questions for the parties.
Ms. Tran asks Judge Wohl to vacate the Small Claims judgment because Mr. Cain did not appear at the Small Claims Hearing. The oral motion to vacate is submitted and will addressed in the judgment.
10:17am
Matter is submitted, no new evidence was indentied or admitted.
